text.title: QA Release Candidate Smoke Pack Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the checklist artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-qa-rc-smoke-pack-template.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.code: { "pack_id": "rc-smoke", "pack_version": "1.4.0", "steps": [ { "n": 1, "name": "auth", "command": "curl -sf $URL/health-auth", "expected": "200 + 'ok'", "critical_path": "auth" } ], "max_wall_clock_seconds": 300, "critical_paths_covered": [ "auth", "payment", "write", "read", "export" ], "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "waiver_policy": "Engineering manager only; reason recorded in release ticket." }
example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: steps>10; max_wall_clock_seconds>300; missing required critical paths; no waiver_policy.
